calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents
Off Calendar May-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ESEQUIEL SANCHEZ'S Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents.

Defendant Esequiel Sanchez's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents is GRANTED.

The record demonstrates Plaintiff Capital One, N.A. did not provide any responses to Defendant's Request For Admissions. Set One. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280.) Plaintiff's failure to timely respond is not excused. No meet and confer requirement attaches when no responses have been provided.

Defendant Esequiel Sanchez's RFAs, Set One are deemed admitted.

To the extent Defendant's reference to Code of Civil Procedure section 2023.010 is a request for additional sanctions, the request is denied.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
